name: ExtensionStructureMap_Group_Rule_Target_Parameter_Value
title: R5: value additional types
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` 1..1 `boolean, date, dateTime, decimal, id, integer, string, time`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` 1..1 `boolean, date, dateTime, decimal, id, integer, string, time`
*  R4B: `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` 1..1 `boolean, decimal, id, integer, string`
*  R4: `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` 1..1 `boolean, decimal, id, integer, string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` do not cover the following types: date, dateTime, time.
The target context `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter.value[x]` is a choice-type element and cannot directly hold extensions. The context is moved up to parent element `StructureMap.group.rule.target.parameter`.
